heading: State plan
label: 3304 State plan
text: Each State desiring to receive funds under this subchapter for any fiscal year shall submit and have approved a unified State plan in accordance with or a combined State plan in accordance with .section 3112 of this titlesection 3113 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title
